title: BEM-845 verify protocol
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-25 | 07:28 (UTC+3)'
proto=Path('governance/protocols/BEM844_AGREED_MULTI_AGENT_DEVELOPMENT_PROTOCOL.md')
exists=proto.exists()
text=proto.read_text(errors='ignore') if exists else ''
status='protocol_verified_next_active_created' if exists and 'Agreed Multi-Agent Development Protocol' in text else 'protocol_missing_or_invalid'
next_action='start implementation from agreed protocol: convert protocol into P0/P1 roadmap tasks without waiting for operator'
state={'bem':'BEM-845','status':status,'protocol_path':str(proto),'protocol_exists':exists,'protocol_size':len(text),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem845_verify_protocol_and_next_active_step.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem845_verify_protocol_and_next_active_step.md').write_text('# BEM-845 | Verify Protocol And Next Active Step | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next_implement_agreed_protocol.md').write_text('# BEM-845 Next | Implement agreed protocol'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-845'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem845_verify_protocol_and_next_active_step.json','governance/reports/bem845_verify_protocol_and_next_active_step.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next_implement_agreed_protocol.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Verified BEM-844 agreed protocol file exists and created the next active implementation step')
"""
No issue comments.
